_readme: Deployment manifest for Geldux testnet frontend. All addresses are Base Sepolia testnet. Not for mainnet use.

entryPoints: openWithPermitAndPriceUpdate(bytes32 key, bool isLong, uint8 leverage, uint256 collateral, bool reduceOnly, uint256 deadline, uint8 v, bytes32 r, bytes32 s, bytes[] updateData) payable
increaseWithPermitAndPriceUpdate(uint256 posId, uint256 extra, uint256 deadline, uint8 v, bytes32 r, bytes32 s, bytes[] updateData) payable
partialCloseWithPriceUpdate(uint256 posId, uint256 collateralDelta, bytes[] updateData) payable
PERP_CORE.permitSpender: PERP_CORE is the permit spender for isolated open and increase

entryPoints: createLimitOrder(bytes32 assetKey, bool isLong, uint8 leverage, uint256 collateral, bool reduceOnly, uint256 triggerPrice) payable
createStopLoss(uint256 posId, uint256 triggerPrice, uint256 fractionBps) payable
createTakeProfit(uint256 posId, uint256 triggerPrice, uint256 fractionBps) payable
ORDER_MANAGER.note: Limit orders require prior USDC approval (not permit-based)

entryPoints: depositWithPermit(uint256 amt, uint256 deadline, uint8 v, bytes32 r, bytes32 s)
openPosition(bytes32 key, bool isLong, uint8 leverage, uint256 collateral, bool reduceOnly)
CROSS_MARGIN.permitSpender: CROSS_MARGIN is the permit spender for cross deposit

USDC.warning: Non-standard: uses 18 decimals, not the 6-decimal standard USDC. All amount math in this repo uses 1e18. Do not change without updating all contract interactions.
USDC.domainSeparatorDetection: Auto-detected at runtime via TypedDataEncoder.hashDomain against on-chain DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()

SPOT_DEX.note: Market IDs are bytes32. quote() returns (amountOut, fee, priceUSD). tokenReserve is the token-side reserve, not USDC.

BTC.maxLeverage_note: Frontend cap — actual limit is PERP_CONFIG.getAsset(key).maxLeverage. Keep in sync.

ETH.maxLeverage_note: Frontend cap — actual limit is PERP_CONFIG.getAsset(key).maxLeverage. Keep in sync.

SOL.maxLeverage_note: Frontend cap — actual limit is PERP_CONFIG.getAsset(key).maxLeverage. Keep in sync.

envRequired.VITE_ALCHEMY_API_KEY: Base Sepolia Alchemy RPC key. Without this, falls back to public RPCs (slower, less reliable).

envOptional.VITE_SUPABASE_URL: Supabase project URL (leaderboard / notifications — not yet wired)
envOptional.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: Supabase anon key (leaderboard / notifications — not yet wired)

knownLimitations: Spot trading is UI-only (coming soon) — no swap contracts wired
maxLev in markets.js is not validated against on-chain PERP_CONFIG at runtime
services/web3/ directory contains an older service layer not currently used by any hook
Liquidation price shown in UI is an estimate only (uses margin = 0.9/lev approximation)
Limit orders use unlimited USDC approval rather than exact-amount permit
Solidity source for deployed contracts is not in this repo — verify via block explorer
